title: Genesis Block
significance: Satoshi Nakamoto mines the first Bitcoin block

title: First Transaction
significance: Satoshi sends 10 BTC to Hal Finney in the first-ever Bitcoin transaction

title: First Exchange Rate
significance: New Liberty Standard publishes the first BTC/USD exchange rate

title: Pizza Day
significance: Laszlo Hanyecz pays 10,000 BTC for two Papa John's pizzas — first real-world purchase

title: Slashdot Mention
significance: Bitcoin featured on Slashdot, price surges 10x in days

title: Parity with USD
significance: Bitcoin reaches $1.00 for the first time

title: First Bubble Peak
significance: BTC hits $31.91 on Mt.Gox before crashing 94% over next 5 months

title: First Halving
significance: Block reward drops from 50 to 25 BTC — first supply shock

title: First $100
significance: Bitcoin crosses $100 for the first time amid Cyprus banking crisis
driver: Cyprus bail-in narrative — BTC as safe haven

title: First $1,000
significance: Bitcoin crosses $1,000 driven by Chinese exchange volume

title: Mt. Gox Collapse
significance: World's largest exchange Mt.Gox files bankruptcy after losing 850,000 BTC
driver: Exchange hack — 6% of all BTC lost

title: Second Halving
significance: Block reward drops from 25 to 12.5 BTC

title: Bitcoin Cash Fork
significance: Bitcoin Cash hard fork over block size debate — first major chain split

title: CME Futures Launch
significance: CME Group launches Bitcoin futures — Wall Street enters crypto

title: 2017 ATH
significance: Bitcoin reaches $19,783 — peak of ICO mania bull run

title: 2018 Bear Bottom
significance: BTC bottoms at $3,200 — 84% crash from ATH

title: COVID Crash
significance: BTC crashes 50% in a day as COVID pandemic triggers global market selloff

title: Third Halving
significance: Block reward drops from 12.5 to 6.25 BTC

title: Square Buys BTC
significance: Square invests $50M in Bitcoin — corporate treasury trend begins

title: Tesla Buys BTC
significance: Tesla announces $1.5B Bitcoin purchase — BTC crosses $46K

title: El Salvador Legal Tender
significance: El Salvador becomes first country to adopt Bitcoin as legal tender

title: 2021 ATH
significance: Bitcoin reaches all-time high of $69,000

title: Luna/Terra Collapse
significance: Terra/Luna algorithmic stablecoin collapse wipes $40B, triggers contagion

title: FTX Collapse
significance: FTX exchange files bankruptcy — Sam Bankman-Fried arrested for fraud

title: Spot ETF Approved
significance: SEC approves 11 spot Bitcoin ETFs — BlackRock IBIT leads with record inflows

title: New ATH Pre-Halving
significance: BTC sets new all-time high BEFORE halving for the first time ever

title: Fourth Halving
significance: Block reward drops from 6.25 to 3.125 BTC

title: First $100,000
significance: Bitcoin crosses $100,000 for the first time — landmark psychological milestone

title: Strategic Reserve EO
significance: US Executive Order exploring Bitcoin Strategic Reserve — nation-state accumulation begins
